checkin.journal:
Today I'm feeling good, it was a bit weird at night, like I didn't feel that deep sleep. I guess might have been creatine that affected this. So today I didn't take creatine, but what's interesting is that my mind actually is faster, a little bit, and I feel more myself. Definitely creatine has some benefits, and in low doses it does have good use. 

I should definitely try it again, maybe tomorrow just to take a cram in the morning.
4/10 bloating
